subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1915-03-10
subcodes.first_line: My sole aim in the education of these boys amounted to this: I hoped that after their graduation these boys would arise with the utmost severance... but none of them fulfilled my desire
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @the state of enkindlement in teaching, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @being a source of light; guidance, @suffering and imprisonment, @call to action, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @devotion; sacrifice; consecration in teaching the Cause
